prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2024年物理类最低位次稳定在10604→10750→10678→10779之间，近4年波动极小，基本在10600-10800区间内；2025年因某专业组（再选化学）出现断档，校最低位次骤降至32386名，但其余专业组正常位次仍在6552-13642之间，断档属偶发异常，不代表学校整体录取水平下滑；该校在甘肃省物理类招生计划从2021年53人逐年递增至2025年58人，2026年大幅扩招至82人，较2025年增长约41.4%，扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取位次（位次数字增大），竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京林业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第83名，属中上游211，学校层次稳定，对考生吸引力保持平稳；2024年声誉评价偏负面（陕西文科招生断档），2026年声誉评价偏负面（师德师风相关事件），但整体关注度不高；抖音热度排名第51位（较热），短视频曝光一般，未出现明显的报考热度飙升信号；风景园林学为A+学科，为该校王牌专业，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力；林学、林业工程等传统优势学科在农林类院校中认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业招生计划增加；本省2026年考生总数约218700人，按近年物理类占比约67%估算约146500人，较2025年物理类121443人增长约20.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；该校位于北京，对甘肃考生有较强地域吸引力；甘肃省属西北地区，赴京求学意愿较强，但2026年大幅扩招82人（较2025年增加24人）将有效对冲地域偏好带来的竞争压力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2021-2024年位次稳定在10600-10800区间、2025年断档属偶发异常不宜作为基准、2026年大幅扩招41.4%将显著拉低位次、本省考生规模扩大约20.6%加剧竞争等多重因素，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将较2024年正常水平（约10779名）小幅后移，预测最低位次约11000名，区间10500-11500名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for Physics Category remained stable between 10604 → 10750 → 10678 → 10779, with minimal fluctuation over the past 4 years, basically within the 10600-10800 range; in 2025, due to a gap in a certain subject group (requiring Chemistry), the university's minimum ranking dropped sharply to 32386, but the normal rankings of other subject groups remained between 6552-13642, indicating the gap was an occasional anomaly and does not represent an overall decline in the university's admission level; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Gansu Province increased from 53 in 2021 to 58 in 2025, and expanded significantly to 82 in 2026, an increase of about 41.4% compared to 2025, which will directly lower the admission ranking (ranking number increases), easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Forestry University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 83rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with a stable university level and steady attraction to candidates; in 2024, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (gap in Shaanxi Liberal Arts admissions), and in 2026, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (incidents related to teacher ethics), but overall attention is not high; Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with average short video exposure, showing no clear signs of a surge in application popularity; Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline, the university's flagship major, strongly attracting candidates interested in related fields; Forestry, Forestry Engineering, and other traditional advantageous disciplines are highly recognized among agricultural and forestry universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication remains high, and the university's enrollment plan for related majors has increased; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 218,700, with an estimated 146,500 in Physics Category based on the recent proportion of about 67%, an increase of about 20.6% compared to 121,443 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates; Gansu Province is in the northwest region, with a strong willingness to study in Beijing, but the significant expansion of 82 places in 2026 (an increase of 24 compared to 2025) will effectively offset the competition pressure from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the stable ranking range of 10600-10800 from 2021 to 2024, the 2025 gap being an occasional anomaly not suitable as a baseline, the significant 41.4% expansion in 2026 which will notably lower the ranking, and the approximately 20.6% increase in the province's candidate pool intensifying competition, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to the normal level in 2024 (about 10779), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 11000, and a range of 10500-11500.

Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (10500-11500) are advised to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 10500) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Landscape Architecture Liangxi Experimental Class and Computer Science; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 11500) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were 1981 → 2083 → 1987 → 1839 → 2029, fluctuating narrowly within the 1839-2083 range, with a fluctuation range of only about 244 places over the past 5 years, showing an extremely stable trend; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 2029; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu's history category was 9 in 2021, 8 in 2022-2023, 10 in 2024-2025, and will increase to 12 in 2026, a 20% increase compared to 2025, with a significant expansion that will moderately lower the admission ranking (increase in ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class, with a soft science ranking of about 83, the university level is stable; in 2024, the reputation was slightly negative (liberal arts cutoff in Shaanxi), but the history category ranking in Gansu was not significantly affected; in 2026, the reputation is slightly negative (teacher ethics), overall attention is average; Douyin popularity ranking is 51st (relatively hot), with no abnormal signals in application popularity; Landscape Architecture is A+, but the history category majors are mainly Business Administration, English, Law, etc., with low correlation to the university's flagship disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity, Business Administration is divided and wait-and-see, English/Business English is generally wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 218,700, with an estimated 72,171 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 33%, an increase of about 23.6% compared to 58,374 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to liberal arts candidates in Gansu; in 2026, enrollment expands to 12 (an increase of 2), a 20% expansion, but the absolute increase is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable fluctuation of historical rankings (1839-2083 range), the 20% expansion in 2026 moderately lowering the ranking, and the approximately 23.6% increase in history category candidates in the province intensifying competition, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for the history category in 2026 will slightly shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 2029, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 2100, in the range of 2000-2200.
